caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" written in gold lettering, and headphones sits at a desk in a studio. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring repeated gold stars and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE." To his right, a professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned close to his mouth, and a black mug with red text that reads "TIME TO TALK OUT YOUR GAME" sits on the desk. Behind him, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the background, a red "BOSS TALK" logo is partially visible. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly with his right hand, while his facial expression shifts as he talks. A small logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
